implementationGuardrails.description: Specific guardrails for implementing the Lighthouse fixes. Must reference real Lighthouse audit IDs.

doNotBreakConstraints.description: Constraints that must not be violated during implementation, such as preserving existing behavior, avoiding unrelated changes.

humanReviewTriggers.description: Conditions that trigger human review, such as significant layout changes, third-party dependency changes.

riskNotes.description: Risk notes tied to specific Lighthouse audit IDs, acknowledging edge cases and uncertainties.

verificationBoundaries.description: Specific verification steps a developer should perform after implementation, referencing Lighthouse retests and browser checks.
